description: Large Turkey Roasting Tray | Extra Large Roasting Bags | Non-Stick Aluminium Kitchen Foil Extra Wide Suitable for Cooking Roasting Turkey Freezing Wrapping and Storage Turkey Roasting Tray: - For the perfect Christmas Turkey, Our Turkey Roasting Tray provides a fuss free cooking solution. Robust and easy to use it holds in all the juices, and better still there’s no need to wash up afterwards. Use alongside the Turkey Roasting Foil to retain the flavour of the food. Roast the perfect Christmas Turkey without the fuss Easy to use & Keeps in all the juices Skin turns golden and crispy Saves on washing up Turkey Tray Size - 44.4cm x 32.5cm x 7.5cm Large Turkey Roasting Bags - Large enough to fit a Turkey Perfect for creating great tasting Roasts without the fuss Roasting Bags - Seals in flavour and prevent food from drying out Easy to use, saves on washing up Suitable for use in conventional ovens and microwaves Large Roasting Bag Sizes - 45cm x 55cm The Non-Stick Kitchen Foil Extra Wide - Our easy lift surface to prevent food from sticking No need to use oil or butter Tear-resistant & Heat-resistant Saves washing up Suitable for cooking, baking, roasting and freezing Extra Wide to cover your larger baking trays and food for cooking Sizes -Width x Roll Length - 45cm x 5m
